mapper.sql: id, created_time, created_by, updated_time, updated_by, batch_no, serial_no, title, work_order_no, contact_phone, appeal_phone, appeal_content, reply_content, appeal_type, satisfaction, unsatisfied_reason, online_supervision_no, supervision_return_time, supervision_finish_time, supervision_reply_content, supervision_sms_satisfaction, supervision_return_content, judgment_level1, judgment_level2, process_result, is_final, plan_finish_time, category_adjust, undertaker_unit, final_result, created_org_id

t3.id, t3.created_time, t3.created_by, t3.updated_time, t3.updated_by, t3.batch_no, t3.title, t3.work_order_no, t3.contact_phone, t3.appeal_phone, t3.appeal_content, t3.reply_content, t3.appeal_type, t3.satisfaction, t3.unsatisfied_reason, t3.online_supervision_no, t3.supervision_return_time, t3.supervision_finish_time, t3.supervision_reply_content, t3.supervision_sms_satisfaction, t3.supervision_return_content, t3.judgment_level1, t3.judgment_level2, t3.process_result, t3.is_final, t3.plan_finish_time, t3.category_adjust, t3.undertaker_unit, t3.final_result, t3.created_org_id, t3.order_category_id, t3.order_category_name, t3.allow_back, t3.allow_back_time, t3.allow_comment, t3.settle_condition
mapper.select:
select
FROM chief_work_order_item t3 where t3.id in ( SELECT DISTINCT t2.order_no as task_order_no FROM normal_work_order_task t2 WHERE
t2.current_node_code IN ( SELECT t1.node_code FROM role_status_mapping t1 WHERE t1.display_status = #{model.displayStatus} AND t1.role_code = '1' ) and t2.valid = '1' and t2.level = '0'
AND FIND_IN_SET(#{model.coOrccId}, t2.co_unit_ids)
AND FIND_IN_SET(#{model.coOrccId}, t2.cc_unit_ids)
t2.current_node_code IN ( SELECT t1.node_code FROM role_status_mapping t1 WHERE t1.display_status = #{model.displayStatus} AND t1.role_code = #{model.roleCode} ) AND t2.lead_unit_id = #{model.leadUnitId} and t2.valid = '1' and t2.level = '0'
)
${ew.sqlSegment}

SELECT
FROM chief_work_order_item t3 RIGHT JOIN ( SELECT DISTINCT t2.order_no as task_order_no FROM normal_work_order_task t2 WHERE t2.current_node_code IN ( SELECT t1.node_code FROM role_status_mapping t1 WHERE t1.display_status = #{model.displayStatus} AND t1.role_code = '1' ) and t2.valid = '1' and t2.level = '0' ) t4 ON t3.work_order_no = t4.task_order_no
AND t3.work_order_no IN
#{item}

select
FROM chief_work_order_item t3 WHERE t3.allow_comment = '1' AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM `chief_work_order_dynamic` t2 WHERE t2.order_no = t3.work_order_no AND t2.operator_id = #{model.operatorId} AND t2.process_type = '批示' )
